heading: Art. 92. Failure to obey order or regulation
label: 892 Art. 92. Failure to obey order or regulation
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)89250:686.(Art. 92), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 136The word “order” is substituted for the word “same”.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)89250:686.(Art. 92), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 136The word “order” is substituted for the word “same”.

children.text: violates or fails to obey any lawful general order or regulation;
having knowledge of any other lawful order issued by a member of the armed forces, which it is his duty to obey, fails to obey the order; or
is derelict in the performance of his duties;
